question: What are the two fundamental components of Mechanoid 'Gear-Blood'?

answers.original: Mechanoids are composed of Liquid-Steel and energized by Spark-Motes.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Forge-Cities are the urban centers of Mechanoid society, reflecting their value of efficiency.

entities.name: Gear-Blood Circulation Systems
entities.description: Gear-Blood circulation systems are advanced engineering marvels within Mechanoids.

entities.name: Gear-Blood
entities.description: Gear-Blood is the fluid that flows through Mechanoid systems, requiring regular filtering to prevent contamination.

entities.name: Mechanoid
entities.description: Mechanoids are robotic beings primarily composed of Liquid-Steel and energized by Spark-Motes.

relations.description: Mechanoids possess advanced Gear-Blood circulation systems that are marvels of engineering.
